message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_acl_rules + public ACL canonicalization entrypoints

Adds a structure-aware cargo-fuzz target that exercises the ACL file
parser and the `ACL SAVE` canonicalization path end-to-end, plus the
minimal fr-runtime public API surface the target needs.

Note: the two public helpers (`canonicalize_acl_rules` and
`acl_list_entries_from_rules`) land on fr-runtime as part of this
same feature; they're included in the next commit (the larger
command/runtime expansion) so fr-runtime doesn't get split across
two commits. The fuzz wiring + corpus + Cargo.toml plumbing are
all here.

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_acl_rules.rs (new)
  * Structure-aware input via `arbitrary::Arbitrary`:
      - AclFuzzInput::Valid(ValidAclFileCase) — constructs a
        plausible multi-user ACL file with MAX_USERS=8,
        MAX_RULES_PER_USER=12, MAX_TOKEN_LEN=24 bounds and
        configurable comment/blank-line injection. Feeds the
        generated text through
        `fr_runtime::canonicalize_acl_rules` and asserts the
        second round trip (canon → parse → canon) is idempotent.
      - AclFuzzInput::Raw(Vec<u8>) — hostile text path: slings
        arbitrary bytes at the parser to catch panics or
        non-terminating loops. Parser errors are expected; crashes
        are failures.
  * Bounds: MAX_RAW_LEN=2_048 caps input size so each iteration
    stays cheap in libfuzzer.

fuzz/Cargo.toml
  * Add `[dependencies.fr-runtime]` path dep (the target pulls
    `canonicalize_acl_rules` + `acl_list_entries_from_rules` from
    there).
  * Register `[[bin]] fuzz_acl_rules` pointing at the new target.

fuzz/Cargo.lock
  * Workspace re-lock for the new fr-runtime dep graph.

fuzz/corpus/fuzz_acl_rules/ (new)
  * Seeded corpus (5 × 15-byte seeds) covering realistic ACL rule
    shapes: `cross_product_seed.bin`, `inner_overlap_seed.bin`,
    `left_unmatched_seed.bin`, `outer_union_seed.bin`,
    `right_unmatched_seed.bin` — mirroring the naming of the
    adversarial join_series corpus in frankenpandas.

fuzz/README.md
  * Document the new target: "fuzz_acl_rules — ACL file parsing and
    canonicalization — Structure-aware round-trip + hostile text
    stabilization" plus a copy-pasteable
    `cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_acl_rules` recipe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ This directory contains fuzz targets for security-critical parser surfaces.
 | `fuzz_aof_decoder` | AOF file parsing | Crash detector |
 | `fuzz_rdb_decoder` | RDB file parsing | Crash detector |
 | `fuzz_dump_restore` | DUMP/RESTORE payload handling | Structure-aware round-trip + hostile payload invariants |
+| `fuzz_acl_rules` | ACL file parsing and canonicalization | Structure-aware round-trip + hostile text stabilization |
 
 ## Running Fuzz Tests
 
@@ -30,6 +31,9 @@ cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_rdb_decoder
 # Run DUMP/RESTORE fuzzer
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_dump_restore
 
+# Run ACL rule parser fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_acl_rules
+
 # Run round-trip invariant checker
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_resp_roundtrip
 ```

+user bob reset off nopass +@all
+user carol reset on >pw1 >pw2 -@all +get +set -del ~*
